DAT.Hub.Title: Dungeon Alchemist Toolkit
DAT.Hub.Intro: Import a Dungeon Alchemist export and manage stairs/portals between levels.
DAT.Hub.MenuHint: Open the Dungeon Alchemist Toolkit hub (import + stairs tools).
DAT.Hub.ImportHint: Turn a folder of DA floor exports into one native multi-level Scene.
DAT.Hub.AddStairsHint: Place a linked entrance/exit on the canvas (stairs, teleport, or trap).
DAT.Hub.ManagerHint: List, find, edit, and delete this scene's stairs and portals.
